Value: Unit: g, Qty: 10, Prep: Diamond Crystal
Start with a medium sauce or stock pot (10-12 quarts).  Fill with water and bring to a boil
Season the water heavily with kosher salt, around 500g
Ensure all salt is dissolved before service begins; refill water as it evaporates.
Using a pasta or edamame basket, drop the frozen edamame into the boiling water
Allow to cook for ~2-3 mins or until pods are cooked and floating (taste to check)
Remove from water, shaking the basket to remove excess water
Transfer to a medium mixing bowl and season with Edamame Spice  (10g or more, to taste)
Reserve to the serving edamame basket (bamboo) and garnish with maldon on top.
Bamboo Steam Basket, deep side up
(after plating edamame) round bamboo basket to top
